LAW & MOTION/DISCOVERY, DEPT. 301, AS TO MARCH-14-2025 HEARING RE: PETITIONER SINDY CRISOSTOMO-RIVERA'S HEARING ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER SINDY CRISOSTOMO-RIVERA'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE PETITION FOR WRIT OF PROHIBITION AND ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS, IS DENIED (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING.) COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (301/CVA)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing (On Petition For Writ Of Mandate)
Off Calendar Mar-14-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances;
Atty. ROSE MISHAAN, Esq. of Law Offices Of Marsanne Weese (tel: 415-565-9600) for Petitioner.
Atty. AUSTIN CATTERMOLE, Esq. (via Zoom videoconference) of the Office of The Attorney General of California (tel: 510-879-0091) for Respondent.

Hearing Re: PETITIONER SINDY CRISOSTOMO-RIVERA's Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Petitioner Sindy Crisostomo-Rivera's Petition for Writ of Mandate, or in the alternative Petition for Writ of Prohibition and Attorney's Fees and Costs, is denied (see word minutes for complete ruling.)

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling, with a cover letter stating compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
